reviews.review_title: VR Handball Game—A Must-Try for Fans!
reviews.review_description:
This is the first and currently the only handball game in VR, and it does a great job capturing the intensity of one of the hardest and fastest ball games out there. The gameplay is fast-paced and fun, with plenty of modes and things to discover, keeping it engaging for both casual players and handball enthusiasts.

The physics feel solid, making each throw and movement satisfying and realistic. If you're a handball fan—or just looking for a fresh and exciting VR sports experience—this game is definitely worth checking out! 🏆🔥

I didn't know that playing handball is so enjoyable. In the game I can setup my own team (even with names on tshirts), do some training (which I suggest to start with), play matches, tournaments, leagues. Interesting fact is that I can switch to the goalkeeper in matches and training as well. 
There are tons of customisation options that I haven't touched, I just play on default settings. Its nice that you can add some height. Ball throwing feels amazing. If you're a fun of handball, basketball or soccer/football then you must try this one.

reviews.review_title: Very nice game for the whole family
reviews.review_description: Very nice game for the whole family. We move around the pitch very pleasantly. It's great that you can both play on the pitch and take the goalkeeper's place. Nice slow motion effect. Nice commentator.

Handball Thrill VR is the most fun I’ve had in a VR sports game! The fast-paced gameplay and smooth throwing mechanics make it feel like a real handball match. The immersion is incredible—you truly feel like you're on the court!
I love handball and I love this game. The moment when ball hits the net feels amazing. And also goalkeeping is great.

I’ve tried many VR sports games, but this one is easily my favorite. The fast-paced gameplay, competitive matches, and overall polish make it stand out. Whether you’re a handball fan or not, this game is a must-play
